# Kevin Astuhuaman

> AI Product Manager | Ex-PayPal AI/ML Observability | Berkeley Haas MBA '26 | 7 years building products and enjoying every minute of it.

Kevin's most recent enterprise AI proof is an agentic observability prototype at PayPal Checkout. He also built Trackly, a live job-search product spanning web, iOS, macOS, CLI, MCP, matching, chat, and voice. At Berkeley Haas, he worked on the Fujitsu and MoBagel Open Innovation challenge across AI product strategy, high-fidelity prototyping, roadmap, business model, and go-to-market recommendations. He previously progressed through four product roles at Banco de Credito BCP, part of Credicorp.

## Primary pages

- [Portfolio](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/): Kevin's recruiting profile and selected work
- [PayPal AI observability case study](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/projects/paypal-ai-observability/): Agentic investigation, product decisions, prototype outcomes, and public-safety boundaries
- [Trackly case study](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/projects/trackly/): Product decisions, system quality, and cross-platform delivery
- [Berkeley and MoBagel case study](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/projects/berkeley-mobagel-ai-gtm/): AI product adoption, high-fidelity prototyping, roadmap, business model, and GTM
- [AI Product Builder Stack](https://kevinastuhuaman.github.io/ai-product-builder-stack/): 65 verified tools and product patterns organized by outcome, evidence, project, and lifecycle state
- [Human Control Plane](https://kevinastuhuaman.github.io/human-in-the-loop-patterns/): Interactive product study for Undo, confirmation, fresh approval, and accountable-owner patterns
- [AI Product Motion Studies](https://kevinastuhuaman.github.io/ai-product-motion-studies/): Three interactive studies for workflow structure, accountable recovery, and cross-surface product continuity
- [Resume](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/resume/): Complete chronological experience
- [Public evidence](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/proof/): Sources and context for published claims
- [Contact](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/contact/): LinkedIn and email
- [Ask Kevin's portfolio](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/ask/): Public-corpus assistant with static cited answers

## Machine-readable context

- [Full plain-text profile](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/llms-full.txt): Detailed public recruiting context
- [Structured profile](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/profile.json): Public identity, experience, and claims
- [Structured projects](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/projects.json): Project summaries and canonical links
- [Public assistant corpus](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/assistant-corpus.json): Pre-approved recruiter questions, answers, and citations
- [Builder Stack structured data](https://kevinastuhuaman.github.io/ai-product-builder-stack/stack.json): Machine-readable technical range and implementation evidence
- [Builder Stack LLM context](https://kevinastuhuaman.github.io/ai-product-builder-stack/llms.txt): Plain-text map of tools, systems, and lifecycle states
- [Human Control Plane structured data](https://kevinastuhuaman.github.io/human-in-the-loop-patterns/project.json): Machine-readable scenarios, policies, thresholds, and public boundary
- [Human Control Plane LLM context](https://kevinastuhuaman.github.io/human-in-the-loop-patterns/llms.txt): Plain-text human-oversight product decisions and evidence
- [Motion Studies structured data](https://kevinastuhuaman.github.io/ai-product-motion-studies/motion-spec.json): Machine-readable timing, sequence, and reduced-motion decisions for 13 product states
- [Motion Studies LLM context](https://kevinastuhuaman.github.io/ai-product-motion-studies/llms.txt): Plain-text interaction-design rationale and public boundary
- [Markdown resume](https://portfolio.kevinastuhuaman.com/resume.md): Crawlable resume equivalent
